interaction_phrase: Regulation (EU) 2023/1781 of the European Parliament and of the Council
occurrence_sentence: An important goal of the National Strategy for Quantum Technologies is to ensure support for the development of quantum technologies so that Czechia can follow up on the European Declaration on Quantum Technologies1  and Regulation (EU) 2023/1781 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 13 September 2023 establishing a framework for measures to strengthen the European semiconductor ecosystem and amending Regulation (EU) 2021/694 (Chips Act)2 , and kept pace with other upcoming European documents and global trends in quantum technologies, and cooperated on the international stage.

An important goal of the National Strategy for Quantum Technologies is to ensure support for the development of quantum technologies so that Czechia can follow up on the European Declaration on Quantum Technologies1  and Regulation (EU) 2023/1781 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 13 September 2023 establishing a framework for measures to strengthen the European semiconductor ecosystem and amending Regulation (EU) 2021/694 (Chips Act)2 , and kept pace with other upcoming European documents and global trends in quantum technologies, and cooperated on the international stage.

occurrence_sentence: The working group consists of a representative of the Minister for Science, Research and Innovation or a member of the government who acts as chair of the RVVI, or a representative appointed by them, a representative of the Ministry of Industry and Trade, a representative of the Ministry of Education, Youth and Sports, a representative of the Ministry of Finance, a representative of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, a representative of the Ministry of Defense, a representative of the Ministry of the Interior, a representative of the National Cyber and Information Security Agency, a representative of the Technology Agency of the Czech Republic, a representative of the Grant Agency of the Czech Republic, a representative of the Czech Rectors' Conference, a representative of the Czech Academy of Sciences, a representative of the Confederation of Industry and Transport, a representative of the Chamber of Commerce, and a representative of the trade unions.
source_actor: Office of the Government of the Czech Republic

occurrence_sentence: It submits a report on the fulfillment of the objectives of the National Strategy for Quantum Technologies to the government for information once every two years after discussion by the Council for Research, Development, and Innovation.
source_actor: Office of the Government of the Czech Republic

occurrence_sentence: The implementation of individual measures of the strategy is conditional on the allocation of financial resources from the state budget.

occurrence_sentence: The measures will be implemented within the expenditure limits of the relevant chapters of the state budget approved for each year.
